The '''''Intrepid''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] that saw service with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was the consular ship of a Rebel ambassador that had been sent on a mission to win the support of the [[Airam (group)|Airam]] at an [[Airam Platform]]. However, during [[Operation: Clean Sweep]] the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] sent a strike force with orders to disable and board the ''Intrepid'' to capture the ambassador.

This incident took place prior to the formation of Imperial [[Task Force Vengeance]], but could be seen as prelude, or perhaps first step, in the conflicting [[Imperial Task Force Vengeance|Imperial]] and [[Spreading the Rebellion|Rebel Alliance]] campaigns in the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam sector]].

==Behind the scenes==
While the occurrence of the space battle depicted in this mission, as well as the participants, is C-[[Canon]], the outcome depends on the actions of the player and is therefore indeterminate. For lack of other canonical information it should be assumed that no lasting effect (such as the destruction of the station or a starship) resulted from the battle.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]''
